ab: kanosang, ko niya ow o ipivatvatek a pya ka pa mood ko jimo?
ch: A:kanosang，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: kanosang, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: yabo jyaken, o yam si mangaz.
en: I don’t have one either. This is mangaz’s.

ab: apya ka vood kopasya, ciaha ta makeykai ko a ma paoli sya jimo.
ch: A:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: noon, aap.
en: Sure, take it.

ab: ayoi, i panci mo yaken a ya somarey nya ji mangaz.
en: Thank you and thank mangaz for me.

ab: yamyan so mo ikakza?
en: May I help you?

ab: ko paolien o adoa ka vakong.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: noon, ya mya pa so mo ikakza?
en: No problem and what else do you need?

ab: ko mamood so atlo a ka vakong.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: ciana, manakem mo do i katlwarow na, ka paoli mosya.
ch: A:好了。記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.

ab: mo pa jya nitoro o ipangongopas.
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: ni paoli kona no kakyab.
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: asyo ko na jya kala o ipangongopas.
ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了。
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: a la mo ni pavood ji tanakasang.
en: Maybe you lend it to tanakasang.

ab: ko jyatenngi. mange ko pala i panahes jya.
en: I don’t know. If so, let me go and ask her first.

ab: vood pa o ipangongopas ko.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: pozngit, o ayob yaam nani pavood jimo ni yopan?
en: pozngit, did yopan lend you this coat?

ab: beken, nani sazangan ni ina.
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: yamey yangey o ayob nyo a kani yopan.
en: yopan’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: ya jimey yangey, tamavaheng o ayob na.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: azaon, kani mamood ji mahanang so nizpi?
en: azaon, did you borrow money from mahanang?

ab: yamyan, ko poapaolin siciarow ya am, ko jini manakem o nizpi.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: si mango mo paolin?
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: paolin ko jia simarow.
en: I will return to him tomorrow.

ab: noon, ipanci ko jia.
en: Okay, I will tell him.
